summary:
THE ASTEROID VISION: Brandon recounts an open-eyed vision he experienced 11 months prior regarding a massive asteroid, which he identifies as Apophis or the biblical Wormwood, expected to impact Earth around 2029. While standing outside near a carport, Brandon observed a humongous rock, the size of a major building, descending from the sky with a blinding fire trail. The object moved incredibly fast from the West to the East, creating a powerful sonic boom that deafened ears and shook the surroundings, breaking house windows in the process.

GOVERNMENT INTERCEPTION ATTEMPT: Brandon describes the United States government's efforts to destroy the incoming asteroid. Because the object was traveling too fast for conventional rockets, authorities deployed a massive green laser beam originating from the Alabama and New Orleans region. The laser struck the asteroid over the Tennessee and Kentucky area, cutting it in half and splitting it into three distinct pieces instead of completely destroying it.

CARIBBEAN IMPACT AND TSUNAMI DESTRUCTION: Brandon details that the largest fragment of the split asteroid crashed into the ocean near San Juan, Puerto Rico. This impact generated a catastrophic tsunami traveling at the speed of sound and reaching heights far exceeding several hundred feet. The massive wave completely saturated and wiped out multiple islands, including the Bahamas, St. Martin, St. Thomas, Puerto Rico, Haiti, and Cuba, destroying everything except for the highest mountain regions before people had time to evacuate.

GLOBAL COASTAL DEVASTATION: Brandon explains that the catastrophic tsunami continued its path of destruction beyond the Caribbean, striking the United States Atlantic coast. The waters flooded miles inland, wiping out houses and major hotels in Florida cities like Miami and Fort Lauderdale, and surging all the way up to Cape Hatteras Island in North Carolina. The wave's immense power also propelled it across the ocean to strike the coastlines of Africa and Europe, causing total devastation in places like England.

WARNINGS AND RELIGIOUS CRITIQUE: Brandon connects this visionary event to the biblical last days and the impending return of Jesus Christ. He urges individuals to remain alert and to relocate if they feel divinely instructed to do so. Brandon also critiques the contemporary Christian church, stating that it has abandoned teachings of holiness and repentance in favor of a seeker-friendly gospel that leaves the congregation spiritually anemic and unprepared for the times akin to the days of Noah.
rawData: [May 25, 2024]-[What the Lord showed me about Wormwood]-[https://youtu.be/Vt7BLMbB4RU]-[Hey, good morning, family. How y'all been doing? I'm going to go over a word that I gave 10 months ago. It was on one of the big prophecy channels, and they were talking about it, questioning whether it was really a real visit or a vision from the Lord. Rightfully so, there's a lot of flaky stuff on YouTube, but I'm going to tell you this: it's genuine, it's real, and the Spirit of the Lord spoke to me just like He does many times. I honestly don't even watch these channels that talk about this stuff because I'm very sensitive to the Spirit of God, and there are a lot of false prophets out there. Whenever I hear it, immediately I know if that is not the Lord or if it is the Lord. If I get a mixed bag on that channel, I don't go back to it. I'm just saying. People ask who it is, but that's between you and God. I'm not going to tell you who I believe is a false prophet on YouTube; that's just not what we're going to do. What I want to tell you is that after taking time to pray over this—it's been about 11 months since I gave this word—I asked the Lord what He showed me about the big asteroid. I believe that Tom Horn gave that word before he went home to be with the Lord about Apophis, which I believe is Wormwood. It talks about it in the Book of Revelation, that there will be a massive asteroid that hits the Earth. I believe that what the Lord showed me was this massive asteroid that is scheduled to hit in 2029. It's supposed to hit the planet Earth and it's going to be huge; supposedly, NASA has even talked about it being ginormous. I want to go over again what the Lord showed me. I was standing outside praying, and I had an open-eyed vision. When this happened, it was so real that I could actually hear it at the same time I was seeing in the spirit this massive event. I was standing by a carport and all of a sudden, this massive asteroid came. It was so fast and so loud it deafened your ears because the sonic boom was so powerful. It was the size of a major building, a humongous rock. It came out of the sky and shook everything, breaking the windows of all the houses. It was moving so fast you could barely see it—like a fireball with a humongous fire trail behind it. It was shaking your whole entire being as it came in from the West to the East. When it came in, it crashed out by San Juan, Puerto Rico. The United States government was trying to shoot this massive asteroid down, but because it was moving so quickly, they could not hit it with a rocket. They tried to hit it with a massive green laser beam. In the spirit, I could see this beam come out of the Alabama-New Orleans area. I don't know if there's a massive laser beam like that down by the Gulf area, but the beam shot across America. Whenever it hit over the Tennessee-Kentucky area, they hit it with that laser. It cut it in half, but it didn't destroy it; it split into three pieces. Those pieces hit the Earth, and while I don't remember where they all hit, the major part of that rock hit by San Juan, Puerto Rico. The impact was so massive it sent a humongous tidal wave. I tried to give an estimate last time, saying it was several hundred feet high, but it was much more than that. It covered all the islands, including the Bahamas. There was a massive tsunami wave that came up out of the ocean at the speed of sound. It was so fast that people did not have time to evacuate. I saw the water covering all the islands: St. Martin, St. Thomas, San Juan, Haiti, Cuba—all were completely saturated and wiped out. If you weren't high in the mountains, you were destroyed. The wave came into Florida, hitting Miami, Fort Lauderdale, and the whole Atlantic coast. This massive tsunami came miles inland, wiping out major hotels and houses on the Atlantic seaboard. It went all the way up to Cape Hatteras Island in North Carolina. Part of the tsunami went clear into Africa and Europe, wiping out places in England. It was moving so quickly that people didn't have time to evacuate and were caught up in the water. This was a very powerful experience. I believe this is Wormwood; I really believe this is Apophis. A lot of people say that it is supposed to miss the Earth in 2029, but I believe we're going to have a direct impact soon. Whether the Rapture of the church has taken place first or this is part of it, I don't know. I'm not a Bible scholar; I just pray and the Lord shows me things to warn people that Jesus is coming. These are the signs of the times. We are in the last of the last days. We are getting so close to the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. This was an actual thing that the Lord showed me in prayer. If you hear the voice of the Lord telling you to move out of a certain area, you need to listen to Him. We are going to experience things we've never thought we would see in the coming days. I believe Jesus is coming sooner than many think, but nobody knows the day or the hour. Have an expectation inside of you for His coming. Be excited and have a sense of urgency, like Noah was when he was building the ark. As in the days of Noah, so will it be when the Son of Man returns. Only eight people entered the ark then; people were not expecting the flood. Today, people are not expecting Jesus to come back. Their hearts have become hardened and they seek fleshly things. They have an appearance of godliness but deny the power thereof. Many have itching ears. Even in the body of Christ, the church hasn't preached the truth of holiness and repentance. They've fallen away into a seeker-friendly gospel—milky words with a little porridge. The body of Christ in those churches is anemic and starving spiritually. I'm telling you, Jesus is coming soon. I hope you're watching for Him and your heart is ready. We're going to see signs in the heavens, and this is a major sign prophesied in the Bible. Father, I thank You for every person watching, excited about the coming of Your Son. Thank You, Lord, that Jesus died for us and rose again so that we don't have to go to a devil's hell. We have an expectation of Your Son's soon return. We are looking for You daily, keeping our lamps full of oil. I know there will be a lot of lives lost as the Book of Revelation tells us, but I thank You that You said You didn't want any to perish. I thank You that people are repenting and coming closer to You today. If we're here when Apophis hits, I thank You, Lord, that believers will hear Your voice and You will quicken their spirits to get out quickly. We give You all the glory, honor, and praise. In the mighty name of Jesus, amen.]
